### O1: Complete the Spinout and Secure the Rio Partnership

**Overall: 🟡 At Risk** | *Critical window: April 19 deadline*

| Key Result | Target | Current | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| KR1.1: Rio signs offer sheet | April 19, 2026 | ⏳ Awaiting — 5 days left | 🟡 At Risk |
| KR1.2: SEC registration filed | 30 days post-Rio | Not started | ⏳ Pending |
| KR1.3: FindMyShots Inc. incorporated | End of Q2 2026 | Not started | ⏳ Pending |
| KR1.4: All equity agreements signed & notarized | End of Q2 2026 | Not started | ⏳ Pending |

**Evidence:** Offer sheet submitted (✅ done). Rio hasn't signed yet — 5 days remain before the April 19 target. Entire spinout chain (SEC → Inc. → equity → SEA) is hard-blocked. No update from Rio since last check. This is still the #1 risk in the entire Q2 plan.

**Blocker:** Rio de la Cruz. One person. One signature. No documented Plan B.

### O2: Hit ₱5.6M FMS Revenue/Month by Q3 2026

**Overall: 🔴 Off Track** | *Structurally gated on Rio — expected at this stage*

| Key Result | Target | Current | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| KR2.1: RunRio photographers onboarded (Phase 1) | Within 2 wks of signing | Not started | ⏳ Pending |
| KR2.2: Monthly FMS Revenue run rate | ₱5.6M/month by Q3 | ₱278K/mo (Apr pace) / ₱1.1M (Mar) | 🔴 Off Track |
| KR2.3: Prepay integration shipped (Phase 2) | Jul–Aug 2026 | Not scoped | 🔴 Off Track |
| KR2.4: Conversion rate (Phase 1) | ~20% | 1.11% (Apr) / 1.24% (Mar) | 🔴 Off Track |
| KR2.5: Conversion rate (Phase 2 — prepay) | ~80% | 1.11% | 🔴 Off Track |
| KR2.6: FMS take rate on Rio events | 45% | 24.9% (Apr) | 🔴 Off Track |
| KR2.7: Events/month | 25+ | 60 (Mar) / ~38 pace (Apr) | 🟢 On Track |
| KR2.8: Secure 2+ additional exclusive organizer partnerships | Q3 2026 | 0 confirmed | 🔴 Off Track |

**Note on KR2.7:** March delivered 60 events — nearly 2.5× the 25-event target. April is pacing to ~38. Events/month is a solved metric. Revenue per event and conversion rate are the real levers.

**Revenue gap analysis:**
- Current run rate: ₱278K/month (Apr) vs ₱5.6M target = **5% of target**
- March was a better month (₱1.1M) = **20% of target**  
- The 4.8× gap from ₱1.1M → ₱5.6M is 100% dependent on prepay + Rio exclusivity
- Prepay integration not yet scoped = Q3 target at risk even with Rio signing

## 💡 Top Actions This Week

### 1. 🔴 URGENT: Follow up Rio today (April 14)
Don't wait for April 19. Van needs to check in with Rio now — tone, hesitations, timeline. If there's any signal of delay, activate Dave immediately. The absence of a Plan B after 5 days is still the #1 structural risk. Goal: confirm he's on track or surface a problem with time to fix it.

### 2. 🔴 URGENT: Get Tim to scope prepay this week
Even if Rio signs on the 19th, Phase 2 slips if Tim doesn't start scoping now. Push for one meeting: what does it take, how long, what needs to be built? Jul/Aug ship date is 3 months away — that's tight. No scope = no ship = no ₱5.6M/month.
